name: OpenMaps
short_desc: Cartografía libre y navegación offline sin rastreadores.
description: OpenMaps es una herramienta de mapas de código abierto diseñada para la privacidad. Permite descargar regiones completas para uso offline, búsqueda de puntos de interés (POI) y rutas en tiempo real. Sin telemetría, sin anuncios y 100% vibe-coded.

name: Ember Browser
short_desc: Modern, fast, and secure Android web browser built with Jetpack Compose.
description:
Ember is a modern, fast, and secure Android web browser designed with a focus on user experience and productivity. Built using Jetpack Compose, it offers a clean interface with advanced features that make it a powerful alternative to traditional browsers.

✨ Features
- Modern UI: Material 3 design with a custom color palette.
- Security & Privacy: Forced HTTPS, SSL certificate blocking, and granular permissions.
- Smart Navigation: Real-time suggestions and pull-to-refresh support.
- Tab Manager Pro: High-efficiency vertical list switcher.
- Integrated Ad-Blocker: Built-in blocking for common ad domains.
- Integrated TTS (Text-to-Speech): Read Page feature to narrate any article.
- Enhanced Downloads: Custom download paths and integrated manager.
- Multimedia Pro: Full support for inline video and background audio.
- Visual Data Management: Favicon support and comprehensive cleaning tools.
- Custom Home: Improved start page with quick links and smart search.

name: Lawnchair
short_desc: Homescreen based on Launcher3 from AOSP.
description: Lawnchair brings Pixel Features to the masses. An open-source project developed by volunteers, Lawnchair has quickly become the de-facto standard for Android customization.

name: Iconify
description: Iconify is an open-source Android app that allows you to customize your device's UI easily. Modify icons, colors, and shapes system-wide.

name: Kvaesitso
description: A search-focused, free and open source launcher for Android. Find apps, contacts, files, and web results directly from your home screen.

name: Muzei
description: Muzei is a live wallpaper that gently refreshes your home screen each day with famous works of art. It also recedes into the background to keep your icons and widgets in the spotlight.

name: KISS Launcher
short_desc: Blazingly fast launcher focused on search.
description: KISS Launcher allows Android users to simplify the home of their interface, to purify their screens and access the functions they need as quickly and as simply as possible.

name: Wall You
short_desc: Wallpaper app built with Material Design 3 (You).
description: An open source wallpaper app providing beautiful images with a modern Material You design interface.

name: Arcticons Dark
description: Arcticons is a line-based icon pack for Android devices. Featuring thousands of elegant, minimalist dark icons for a clean home screen setup.

name: Stario
description: Want to declutter? Do more with Stario — the minimalist launcher designed to keep your focus on what matters most.

name: Delta Icon Pack
short_desc: Minimalistic pastel icon pack for Android.
description: Delta is a beautiful, minimalist icon pack featuring pastel colors and flat designs to make your home screen look elegant.

name: Smartspacer
short_desc: Customizable widget that enhances At a Glance.
description: Smartspacer is a customizable widget that enhances the built-in At a Glance feature on Pixel devices, all without requiring root access.

name: EasyLauncher
short_desc: Minimal and Clutter Free Android launcher.
description: EasyLauncher provides a minimal, clutter-free experience for your Android device, helping you stay productive and focused.

name: ColorBlendr [Root]
description: An application that allows deep system-wide color customization for rooted Android devices, giving you total control over Material You themes.
